question: What is the homeworld of the Jedi Master who trained Ben Solo?
answer:
Ben Solo was trained as a Jedi by his uncle, Luke Skywalker.In canon, Ben Solo (Kylo Ren) was trained in the Jedi arts by Luke Skywalker. Luke Skywalker was born on Polis Massa, but he was raised on and is most associated with **Tatooine** as his homeworld.In canon, Ben Solo (later Kylo Ren) was trained in the Jedi arts by **Luke Skywalker**, whose homeworld is **Tatooine**.

(Note: Ben Solo was also later trained/manipulated by Snoke and Darth Sidious, but Luke Skywalker was his Jedi Master. This is a canon-only storyline, as Ben Solo/Kylo Ren does not have a Legends counterpart.)
